content: check the io status on my computer for 3 s

The `iostat` command hung in this environment, so I couldn’t get live stats directly.

Please run this on your Mac terminal (it will sample for ~3 seconds):

```bash
iostat -w 1 3
```

If you want richer per-process I/O, run:

```bash
sudo fs_usage -w -f filesys
```

(press `Ctrl+C` after ~3 seconds), then paste the output here and I’ll interpret it for you quickly.
